tickets.summary: Tickets are required for all competition rounds (Qualification, Semi-Final and Final). International ticket sales open on 2026-04-25 at 12:00 (local); purchase at https://wag.top/. Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to buy tickets but accreditation is required to access the event.

Tickets go on sale 2026-05-01 10:00 (Beijing time). No public ticket price is listed in the infosheet; price is the same as the official platform. Special ticket service exists for athletes' families; if you cannot buy online, fill the form and email ffengjh@outlook.com or call +86 13974868120. Tickets are personal and non-transferable, one ticket per person, seats randomly assigned. Deadline to request tickets: 2 days before the competition. Tickets are available via on-site pick-up or QR code.

events.name: World Climbing Para Series Salt Lake City 2026

tickets.summary: Tickets are required for Lead Qualification and Lead Final rounds. Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to purchase tickets, but accreditation is required for all rounds. Tickets are sold via USA Climbing Eventbrite. Price and availability are to be confirmed.

Tickets are required for all competition days and are available online at the organiser's shop (see ticket_purchase_url). Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to purchase tickets; accreditation is required for all indoor rounds.

events.name: World Climbing Series Comunidad de Madrid 2026

tickets.summary: Free entry for the public. Accreditation is required to access the event. Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to purchase tickets.

Tickets required for Boulder Semi-Final and Final, and Lead Qualification, Semi-Final and Final. Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to purchase tickets (accreditation required for all rounds). Boulder Qualification is outdoors and does not require event accreditation. Venue access is limited and managed on a first-come, first-served basis.

Para Climbing Qualification and Final entry is free and no tickets are needed. Venue access is limited for people without a World Climbing Series Innsbruck accreditation and is on a first come first serve basis. Tickets are required for other events including Boulder Finals (Women and Men), Lead Semi Finals (Women and Men), and Lead Finals (Women and Men). Single day ticket sales start 2026-04-20.

Tickets are required for Women's Boulder Final, Men's Boulder Final, Lead Semi-Final Men & Women, and Lead Final Men & Women. All other events are free but access is limited for non accredited visitors first come, first serve. Single day tickets go on sale from 2026-04-20 at the ticket link above.
Entry is free of charge. The event is held on a public Kraków square (Rynek Główny) and no tickets are required.

events.name: World Climbing Europe Para Championship Laval 2026
World Climbing Series Salt Lake City 2026

tickets.summary: Tickets will be released in Summer 2026 and will be required for all competition rounds (Men/Women Boulder Qualification, Semi-Final and Final). Registered World Climbing athletes and team officials do not need to purchase tickets, but accreditation is required to access the venue.
